result.stderr:
ensync 1.0.12-alpha+7540b5346d08b7888a125e233b5699bfbaffee66
Copyright (c) 2023 Adam O'Neil

  -i, --init       Creates a blank config file in the current directory

  -c, --config     (Default: .) Path to config file. Omit to use current
                   directory

  -s, --source     Leave blank to merge from the project Assembly or specify a
                   database target

  -t, --target     Named database target to merge to. Omit to use the first one
                   in your config file

  -a, --action     (Default: Preview) Action to perform

  -g, --ignore     Ignore select objects

  -p, --compact    List object names only, without script detail

  -f, --Filter     Script objects where the name contains this text

  -m, --merge      Executes the merge script. Same as setting action = Merge

  -r, --script     Builds a .sql script file and launches it. Same as setting
                   action = Script

  -d, --debug      Emits comments that help explain how SQL is being generated

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.
